response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 18+ years of diverse software engineering experience and current direct involvement in AI infrastructure work (MCP and agentic frameworks at re:cinq). However, the resume shows limited evidence of shipped AI-powered products, strategic advisory work with customers, or cloud platform strategy expertise—all key preferences for this director-level role. The AI focus is very recent (April 2025), raising questions about depth of recognized expertise in the domain.
strengths: Currently hands-on with cutting-edge AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) as Staff Engineer, directly aligned with role focus
18+ years of full-stack technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure—demonstrates adaptability and engineering breadth
Proven entrepreneurial and open-source leadership through GISCollective founding and multiple successful OSS projects (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI field (preferred qualification); AI expertise appears self-taught and very recent rather than formally established
No demonstrated track record of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale—role requires 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products'
Limited evidence of strategic advisory work with customers or partners, or of cloud platform strategy focus beyond one company (Optilyz)
